mapper.insert: insert into checkup_package(department_id, name, price, description, image, create_time, update_time, create_user, update_user) values (#{departmentId}, #{name}, #{price}, #{description}, #{image}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime}, #{createUser}, #{updateUser});
mapper.select: select sd.name, sd.copies, d.image, d.description from checkup_package_doctor sd left join doctor d on sd.doctor_id = d.id where sd.checkup_package_id = #{checkup_packageId}
